problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
